name: MS Presidio
description: Microsoft Presidio PII detection and anonymization. Three services: Analyzer (port 5002), Anonymizer (port 5001), Image Redactor (port 5003).
notes: Images are large (~2 GB each). First pull takes 3–6 minutes. Exposes 3 ports: 5001 (anonymizer), 5002 (analyzer), 5003 (image redactor).
